title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
